name_policy: Personal names remain in original English.
spoiler_policy: Only information available through each current paragraph is used.

blocks.original_text: The scent of hot bread drifting from the shops along the Street of Flour was sweeter than any perfume Arya had ever smelled. She took a deep breath and stepped closer to the pigeon. It was a plump one, speckled brown, busily pecking at a crust that had fallen between two cobblestones, but when Arya’s shadow touched it, it took to the air.
blocks.explanation_zh: Street of Flour的hot bread香气胜过perfume；饥饿Arya靠近一只啄crumbs的肥pigeon。
blocks.literary_note_zh: hot bread sweeter than perfume把贵族审美彻底替换为饥饿感官，Arya的survival state立刻成立。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: Her stick sword whistled out and caught it two feet off the ground, and it went down in a flurry of brown feathers. She was on it in the blink of an eye, grabbing a wing as the pigeon flapped and fluttered. It pecked at her hand. She grabbed its neck and twisted until she felt the bone snap.
blocks.explanation_zh: 她用stick sword击落pigeon，抓住后迅速扭断neck。
blocks.literary_note_zh: stick sword从training toy变成hunting tool，Syrio课程被转译为城市求生技能。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: Compared with catching cats, pigeons were easy.
blocks.explanation_zh: 与Syrio训练的catching cats相比，捕pigeons很容易。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Arya靠pigeon和street observation生存，逐门验证无法离城；饥饿、盗窃和成年捕食风险不断压缩选择。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: A passing septon was looking at her askance. “Here’s the best place to find pigeon,” Arya told him as she brushed herself off and picked up her fallen stick sword. “They come for the crumbs.” He hurried away.
blocks.explanation_zh: 路过septon侧目，Arya用crumbs解释捕猎地点，他匆忙离开。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 她向septon解释不是求认可，而是在被社会目光发现后主动正常化行为。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: She tied the pigeon to her belt and started down the street. A man was pushing a load of tarts by on a two-wheeled cart; the smells sang of blueberries and lemons and apricots. Her stomach made a hollow rumbly noise. “Could I have one?” she heard herself say. “A lemon, or . . . or any kind.”
blocks.explanation_zh: 她把pigeon系在belt，闻到水果tarts后忍不住请求一个。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Arya靠pigeon和street observation生存，逐门验证无法离城；饥饿、盗窃和成年捕食风险不断压缩选择。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: The pushcart man looked her up and down. Plainly he did not like what he saw. “Three coppers.”
blocks.explanation_zh: pushcart man先审视她破败外表，再索要three coppers。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Arya靠pigeon和street observation生存，逐门验证无法离城；饥饿、盗窃和成年捕食风险不断压缩选择。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: Arya tapped her wooden sword against the side of her boot. “I’ll trade you a fat pigeon,” she said.
blocks.explanation_zh: Arya提出用fat pigeon交换。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Arya靠pigeon和street observation生存，逐门验证无法离城；饥饿、盗窃和成年捕食风险不断压缩选择。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: “The Others take your pigeon,” the pushcart man said.
blocks.explanation_zh: 摊贩粗暴拒绝。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Arya靠pigeon和street observation生存，逐门验证无法离城；饥饿、盗窃和成年捕食风险不断压缩选择。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: The tarts were still warm from the oven. The smells were making her mouth water, but she did not have three coppers . . . or one. She gave the pushcart man a look, remembering what Syrio had told her about seeing. He was short, with a little round belly, and when he moved he seemed to favor his left leg a little. She was just thinking that if she snatched a tart and ran he would never be able to catch her when he said, “You be keepin’ your filthy hands off. The gold cloaks know how to deal with thieving little gutter rats, that they do.”
blocks.explanation_zh: 她没有一枚coin，运用Syrio的seeing判断摊贩腿脚，考虑grab tart逃跑，却被识破并威胁交给gold cloaks。
blocks.literary_note_zh: seeing让她评估腿伤与escape route，但vendor也在seeing她；双方互相读取意图。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: Arya glanced warily behind her. Two of the City Watch were standing at the mouth of an alley. Their cloaks hung almost to the ground, the heavy wool dyed a rich gold; their mail and boots and gloves were black. One wore a longsword at his hip, the other an iron cudgel. With a last wistful glance at the tarts, Arya edged back from the cart and hurried off. The gold cloaks had not been paying her any special attention, but the sight of them tied her stomach in knots. Arya had been staying as far from the castle as she could get, yet even from a distance she could see the heads rotting atop the high red walls. Flocks of crows squabbled noisily over each head, thick as flies. The talk in Flea Bottom was that the gold cloaks had thrown in with the Lannisters, their commander raised to a lord, with lands on the Trident and a seat on the king’s council.
blocks.explanation_zh: Arya看见两名City Watch便放弃；远处城墙heads与crows、Flea Bottom传言说明gold cloaks已投Lannister。
blocks.literary_note_zh: heads、crows与gold cloaks同时说明公开恐怖、权力换边和Arya的被捕风险。
blocks.background_zh: **gold cloaks：** King’s Landing City Watch；已支持Lannisters，Janos Slynt获lordship和council seat。

blocks.original_text: She had also heard other things, scary things, things that made no sense to her. Some said her father had murdered King Robert and been slain in turn by Lord Renly. Others insisted that Renly had killed the king in a drunken quarrel between brothers. Why else should he have fled in the night like a common thief? One story said the king had been killed by a boar while hunting, another that he’d died eating a boar, stuffing himself so full that he’d ruptured at the table. No, the king had died at table, others said, but only because Varys the Spider poisoned him. No, it had been the queen who poisoned him. No, he had died of a pox. No, he had choked on a fish bone.
blocks.explanation_zh: 街头流言给Robert death和Eddard角色提供互相矛盾版本，Arya无法判断。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 流言版本互斥却都生动，显示city information由娱乐、偏见和政治宣传混合。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: One thing all the stories agreed on: King Robert was dead. The bells in the seven towers of the Great Sept of Baelor had tolled for a day and a night, the thunder of their grief rolling across the city in a bronze tide. They only rang the bells like that for the death of a king, a tanner’s boy told Arya.
blocks.explanation_zh: 所有故事唯一共识是Robert已死；Great Sept七塔bells曾连续响一日一夜。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Arya靠pigeon和street observation生存，逐门验证无法离城；饥饿、盗窃和成年捕食风险不断压缩选择。
blocks.background_zh: **royal death bells：** Great Sept七塔全响一日一夜表示king death；单塔稍后用于summoning。

blocks.original_text: All she wanted was to go home, but leaving King’s Landing was not so easy as she had hoped. Talk of war was on every lip, and gold cloaks were as thick on the city walls as fleas on . . . well, her, for one. She had been sleeping in Flea Bottom, on rooftops and in stables, wherever she could find a place to lie down, and it hadn’t taken her long to learn that the district was well named.
blocks.explanation_zh: Arya只想回家，却被war戒严困住，只能在Flea Bottom屋顶、stables等处睡。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Flea Bottom名称通过她身上的fleas变成身体事实，贵族孩子被迫进入城市最底层。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: Every day since her escape from the Red Keep, Arya had visited each of the seven city gates in turn. The Dragon Gate, the Lion Gate, and the Old Gate were closed and barred. The Mud Gate and the Gate of the Gods were open, but only to those who wanted to enter the city; the guards let no one out. Those who were allowed to leave left by the King’s Gate or the Iron Gate, but Lannister men-at-arms in crimson cloaks and lion-crested helms manned the guard posts there. Spying down from the roof of an inn by the King’s Gate, Arya saw them searching wagons and carriages, forcing riders to open their saddlebags, and questioning everyone who tried to pass on foot.
blocks.explanation_zh: 她逐日侦察七座gates：多数关闭，开放者只许进，King’s/Iron Gate严格搜查离城者。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 每日轮巡七门是系统性侦察，不是盲目逃跑；她已验证所有常规出口。
blocks.background_zh: **city lockdown：** 七门分别关闭、只进不出或严格搜查，说明Lannisters正主动寻找逃亡者。

blocks.original_text: Sometimes she thought about swimming the river, but the Blackwater Rush was wide and deep, and everyone agreed that its currents were wicked and treacherous. She had no coin to pay a ferryman or take passage on a ship.
blocks.explanation_zh: 游过Blackwater危险且她无钱搭ferry或ship。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Arya靠pigeon和street observation生存，逐门验证无法离城；饥饿、盗窃和成年捕食风险不断压缩选择。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: Her lord father had taught her never to steal, but it was growing harder to remember why. If she did not get out soon, she would have to take her chances with the gold cloaks. She hadn’t gone hungry much since she learned to knock down birds with her stick sword, but she feared so much pigeon was making her sick. A couple she’d eaten raw, before she found Flea Bottom.
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard教她不偷窃，但饥饿侵蚀规则意义；stick sword打鸟避免饿死，生pigeon却使她不适。
blocks.literary_note_zh: never steal在极端饥饿中失去执行基础，文本提出道德教导需要基本生存条件。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: In the Bottom there were pot-shops along the alleys where huge tubs of stew had been simmering for years, and you could trade half your bird for a heel of yesterday’s bread and a “bowl o’ brown,” and they’d even stick the other half in the fire and crisp it up for you, so long as you plucked the feathers yourself. Arya would have given anything for a cup of milk and a lemon cake, but the brown wasn’t so bad. It usually had barley in it, and chunks of carrot and onion and turnip, and sometimes even apple, with a film of grease swimming on top. Mostly she tried not to think about the meat. Once she had gotten a piece of fish.
blocks.explanation_zh: pot-shops用半只鸟换stale bread、bowl o’ brown和烤熟另一半；Arya怀念milk/lemon cake并避免想stew肉来源。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Arya靠pigeon和street observation生存，逐门验证无法离城；饥饿、盗窃和成年捕食风险不断压缩选择。
blocks.background_zh: **bowl o’ brown：** Flea Bottom长期炖煮的廉价杂烩，来源不透明，是底层food economy象征。

blocks.original_text: [Content omitted: sexualized adult gaze directed at a minor. Paragraph position preserved.]
blocks.explanation_zh: [内容省略：成年人对未成年角色的性化凝视。段落位置保留。] Arya在pot-shop被持续打量、尾随和追赶，因此常宁愿挨饿。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 原文的性化凝视不复录；核心是Arya作为孤身未成年人面对的捕食风险迫使她以饥饿换安全。
blocks.background_zh: **内容安全：** 原段中成年人对未成年Arya的性化凝视不复录；保留她遭尾随、追赶及选择挨饿的安全后果。

blocks.original_text: The silver bracelet she’d hoped to sell had been stolen her first night out of the castle, along with her bundle of good clothes, snatched while she slept in a burnt-out house off Pig Alley. All they left her was the cloak she had been huddled in, the leathers on her back, her wooden practice sword . . . and Needle. She’d been lying on top of Needle, or else it would have been gone too; it was worth more than all the rest together. Since then Arya had taken to walking around with her cloak draped over her right arm, to conceal the blade at her hip. The wooden sword she carried in her left hand, out where everybody could see it, to scare off robbers, but there were men in the pot-shops who wouldn’t have been scared off if she’d had a battle-axe. It was enough to make her lose her taste for pigeon and stale bread. Often as not, she went to bed hungry rather than risk the stares.
blocks.explanation_zh: 首夜bracelet和衣服在睡梦中被盗；她靠压住Needle保住剑，此后用cloak隐藏真剑、木剑示警，却仍害怕pot-shop men。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Needle靠身体压住才幸存，cloak/wooden sword构成concealment与deterrence两层防御。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: Once she was outside the city, she would find berries to pick, or orchards she might raid for apples and cherries. Arya remembered seeing some from the kingsroad on the journey south. And she could dig for roots in the forest, even run down some rabbits. In the city, the only things to run down were rats and cats and scrawny dogs. The potshops would give you a fistful of coppers for a litter of pups, she’d heard, but she didn’t like to think about that.
blocks.explanation_zh: 她幻想出城后采berries、偷orchard、挖roots与抓rabbits；城市只剩rats、cats、dogs等令人不愿想的食物经济。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Arya靠pigeon和street observation生存，逐门验证无法离城；饥饿、盗窃和成年捕食风险不断压缩选择。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: Down below the Street of Flour was a maze of twisting alleys and cross streets. Arya scrambled through the crowds, trying to put distance between her and the gold cloaks. She had learned to keep to the center of the street. Sometimes she had to dodge wagons and horses, but at least you could see them coming. If you walked near the buildings, people grabbed you. In some alleys you couldn’t help but brush against the walls; the buildings leaned in so close they almost met.
blocks.explanation_zh: 她在拥挤窄巷保持street center，宁避wagons也不贴building，因为靠墙会被抓。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 她从siblings记忆和Old Nan stories想到river escape，却以Syrio的seeing识破冒充Winterfell guards的Wind Witch陷阱。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: A whooping gang of small children went running past, chasing a rolling hoop. Arya stared at them with resentment, remembering the times she’d played at hoops with Bran and Jon and their baby brother Rickon. She wondered how big Rickon had grown, and whether Bran was sad. She would have given anything if Jon had been here to call her “little sister” and muss her hair. Not that it needed mussing. She’d seen her reflection in puddles, and she didn’t think hair got any more mussed than hers.
blocks.explanation_zh: 一群玩hoop的孩子使她想起Bran、Jon、Rickon，强烈思念little sister称呼和弄乱头发。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 街头play触发Winterfell memory，说明survival competence没有消除她仍是思念siblings的child。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: She had tried talking to the children she saw in the street, hoping to make a friend who would give her a place to sleep, but she must have talked wrong or something. The little ones only looked at her with quick, wary eyes and ran away if she came too close. Their big brothers and sisters asked questions Arya couldn’t answer, called her names, and tried to steal from her. Only yesterday, a scrawny barefoot girl twice her age had knocked her down and tried to pull the boots off her feet, but Arya gave her a crack on her ear with her stick sword that sent her off sobbing and bleeding.
blocks.explanation_zh: 她尝试与street children交朋友却因说话方式暴露不合群；大孩子盘问抢夺，她用stick sword保住boots。
blocks.literary_note_zh: talked wrong暗示她的accent、用词或姿态暴露不同阶层；她无法简单融入street network。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: A gull wheeled overhead as she made her way down the hill toward Flea Bottom. Arya glanced at it thoughtfully, but it was well beyond the reach of her stick. It made her think of the sea. Maybe that was the way out. Old Nan used to tell stories of boys who stowed away on trading galleys and sailed off into all kinds of adventures. Maybe Arya could do that too. She decided to visit the riverfront. It was on the way to the Mud Gate anyway, and she hadn’t checked that one today.
blocks.explanation_zh: gull使她想到sea和Old Nan的stowaway stories，决定去riverfront寻找逃路。
blocks.literary_note_zh: gull→sea→stories形成联想链，Old Nan fiction转为实际escape planning。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: The wharfs were oddly quiet when Arya got there. She spied another pair of gold cloaks, walking side by side through the fish market, but they never so much as looked at her. Half the stalls were empty, and it seemed to her that there were fewer ships at dock than she remembered. Out on the Blackwater, three of the king’s war galleys moved in formation, gold-painted hulls splitting the water as their oars rose and fell. Arya watched them for a bit, then began to make her way along the river.
blocks.explanation_zh: wharfs异常安静、stalls和ships减少，三艘royal war galleys在Blackwater列队。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 她从siblings记忆和Old Nan stories想到river escape，却以Syrio的seeing识破冒充Winterfell guards的Wind Witch陷阱。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: When she saw the guardsmen on the third pier, in grey woolen cloaks trimmed with white satin, her heart almost stopped in her chest. The sight of Winterfell’s colors brought tears to her eyes. Behind them, a sleek three-banked trading galley rocked at her moorings. Arya could not read the name painted on the hull; the words were strange, Myrish, Braavosi, perhaps even High Valyrian. She grabbed a passing longshoreman by the sleeve. “Please,” she said, “what ship is this?”
blocks.explanation_zh: 第三pier出现Winterfell grey-and-white cloaks与一艘trading galley，Arya激动询问船名。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Winterfell colors制造归属捷径，Arya几乎在情绪上先于观察作出结论。
blocks.background_zh: **Wind Witch：** Eddard此前雇来送daughters回Winterfell的Myrish galley；灰白cloak strangers利用其作trap。

blocks.original_text: “She’s the Wind Witch, out of Myr,” the man said.
blocks.explanation_zh: longshoreman说是Myr的Wind Witch。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 她从siblings记忆和Old Nan stories想到river escape，却以Syrio的seeing识破冒充Winterfell guards的Wind Witch陷阱。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: “She’s still here,” Arya blurted. The longshoreman gave her a queer look, shrugged, and walked away. Arya ran toward the pier. The Wind Witch was the ship Father had hired to take her home . . . still waiting! She’d imagined it had sailed ages ago.
blocks.explanation_zh: Arya认出这是Eddard雇来送她回家的ship，惊喜它仍未离港。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 她从siblings记忆和Old Nan stories想到river escape，却以Syrio的seeing识破冒充Winterfell guards的Wind Witch陷阱。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: Two of the guardsmen were dicing together while the third walked rounds, his hand on the pommel of his sword. Ashamed to let them see her crying like a baby, she stopped to rub at her eyes. Her eyes her eyes her eyes, why did . . .
blocks.explanation_zh: 三名guards中两人掷骰、一人巡逻；Arya擦泪时开始提醒自己用eyes。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 她开始哭时用eyes停下，Syrio lesson在最危险的false recognition时刻生效。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: Look with your eyes, she heard Syrio whisper.
blocks.explanation_zh: 记忆中的Syrio命她真正观察。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 她从siblings记忆和Old Nan stories想到river escape，却以Syrio的seeing识破冒充Winterfell guards的Wind Witch陷阱。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: Arya looked. She knew all of her father’s men. The three in the grey cloaks were strangers. “You,” the one walking rounds called out. “What do you want here, boy?” The other two looked up from their dice.
blocks.explanation_zh: 她认得所有Eddard men，眼前三人却全是strangers；对方把她当boy并盘问。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 关键证据不是cloak而是faces：真正认识全部household staff的人能识破uniform deception。
blocks.background_zh: **uniform deception：** 敌人穿Winterfell colors不等于Stark men；Arya凭person recognition识破。

blocks.original_text: It was all Arya could do not to bolt and run, but she knew that if she did, they would be after her at once. She made herself walk closer. They were looking for a girl, but he thought she was a boy. She’d be a boy, then. “Want to buy a pigeon?” She showed him the dead bird.
blocks.explanation_zh: Arya压住逃跑反射，顺势扮boy并举pigeon问是否购买。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 被误认为boy变成临时protective identity，pigeon sale则提供符合street role的cover。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: “Get out of here,” the guardsman said.
blocks.explanation_zh: 假guards命她滚开。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 她从siblings记忆和Old Nan stories想到river escape，却以Syrio的seeing识破冒充Winterfell guards的Wind Witch陷阱。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: Arya did as he told her. She did not have to pretend to be frightened. Behind her, the men went back to their dice.
blocks.explanation_zh: Arya真的害怕却成功自然离开，他们回去掷骰。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 她从siblings记忆和Old Nan stories想到river escape，却以Syrio的seeing识破冒充Winterfell guards的Wind Witch陷阱。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: She could not have said how she got back to Flea Bottom, but she was breathing hard by the time she reached the narrow crooked unpaved streets between the hills. The Bottom had a stench to it, a stink of pigsties and stables and tanner’s sheds, mixed in with the sour smell of winesinks and cheap whorehouses. Arya wound her way through the maze dully. It was not until she caught a whiff of bubbling brown coming through a pot-shop door that she realized her pigeon was gone. It must have slipped from her belt as she ran, or someone had stolen it and she’d never noticed. For a moment she wanted to cry again. She’d have to walk all the way back to the Street of Flour to find another one that plump.
blocks.explanation_zh: 她恍惚回到Flea Bottom，才发现pigeon在逃跑或拥挤中丢失，饥饿损失令她又想哭。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 丢失pigeon把识破trap的成功立即拉回physical survival cost。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: Far across the city, bells began to ring.
blocks.explanation_zh: 远处bells再次响起。
blocks.literary_note_zh: bells先只是一种sound；Arya必须从street explanations逐层推断事件。
blocks.background_zh: **summoning bells：** 单塔鸣响召集city population前往public event，不等于新king death。

blocks.original_text: Arya glanced up, listening, wondering what the ringing meant this time.
blocks.explanation_zh: Arya抬头听，猜测这次含义。
blocks.literary_note_zh: summoning bells与街头人流传来Eddard将被带到Baelor’s Sept的消息；Arya带伤追赶，听见互相冲突的public rumors。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: “What’s this now?” a fat man called from the pot-shop.
blocks.explanation_zh: pot-shop fat man也询问发生什么。
blocks.literary_note_zh: summoning bells与街头人流传来Eddard将被带到Baelor’s Sept的消息；Arya带伤追赶，听见互相冲突的public rumors。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: “The bells again, gods ha’mercy,” wailed an old woman.
blocks.explanation_zh: old woman哀叹bells又响。
blocks.literary_note_zh: summoning bells与街头人流传来Eddard将被带到Baelor’s Sept的消息；Arya带伤追赶，听见互相冲突的public rumors。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: A red-haired whore in a wisp of painted silk pushed open a second-story window. “Is it the boy king that’s died now?” she shouted down, leaning out over the street. “Ah, that’s a boy for you, they never last long.” As she laughed, a naked man slid his arms around her from behind, biting her neck and rubbing the heavy white breasts that hung loose beneath her shift.
blocks.explanation_zh: 楼上adult woman猜boy king死了并开玩笑，背景呈现Flea Bottom日常粗俗。
blocks.literary_note_zh: summoning bells与街头人流传来Eddard将被带到Baelor’s Sept的消息；Arya带伤追赶，听见互相冲突的public rumors。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: “Stupid slut,” the fat man shouted up. “The king’s not dead, that’s only summoning bells. One tower tolling. When the king dies, they ring every bell in the city.”
blocks.explanation_zh: fat man纠正这是单塔summoning bells，不是全城king death bells。
blocks.literary_note_zh: summoning bells与街头人流传来Eddard将被带到Baelor’s Sept的消息；Arya带伤追赶，听见互相冲突的public rumors。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: “Here, quit your biting, or I’ll ring your bells,” the woman in the window said to the man behind her, pushing him off with an elbow. “So who is it died, if not the king?”
blocks.explanation_zh: 楼上女人赶开伴侣，追问若非king是谁死。
blocks.literary_note_zh: summoning bells与街头人流传来Eddard将被带到Baelor’s Sept的消息；Arya带伤追赶，听见互相冲突的public rumors。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: “It’s a summoning,” the fat man repeated.
blocks.explanation_zh: fat man再次强调是summoning。
blocks.literary_note_zh: summoning bells与街头人流传来Eddard将被带到Baelor’s Sept的消息；Arya带伤追赶，听见互相冲突的public rumors。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: Two boys close to Arya’s age scampered past, splashing through a puddle. The old woman cursed them, but they kept right on going. Other people were moving too, heading up the hill to see what the noise was about. Arya ran after the slower boy. “Where you going?” she shouted when she was right behind him. “What’s happening?”
blocks.explanation_zh: 同龄boys随人流上坡；Arya追问去向和事件。
blocks.literary_note_zh: summoning bells与街头人流传来Eddard将被带到Baelor’s Sept的消息；Arya带伤追赶，听见互相冲突的public rumors。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: He glanced back without slowing. “The gold cloaks is carryin’ him to the sept.”
blocks.explanation_zh: boy说gold cloaks正把某人带去sept。
blocks.literary_note_zh: summoning bells与街头人流传来Eddard将被带到Baelor’s Sept的消息；Arya带伤追赶，听见互相冲突的public rumors。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: “Who?” she yelled, running hard.
blocks.explanation_zh: Arya边跑边问是谁。
blocks.literary_note_zh: summoning bells与街头人流传来Eddard将被带到Baelor’s Sept的消息；Arya带伤追赶，听见互相冲突的public rumors。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: “The Hand! They’ll be taking his head off, Buu says.”
blocks.explanation_zh: boy说是Hand，传言要砍头。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Hand/head消息使她失去seeing，摔倒是情绪冲击直接造成身体伤。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: A passing wagon had left a deep rut in the street. The boy leapt over, but Arya never saw it. She tripped and fell, face first, scraping her knee open on a stone and smashing her fingers when her hands hit the hard-packed earth. Needle tangled between her legs. She sobbed as she struggled to her knees. The thumb of her left hand was covered with blood. When she sucked on it, she saw that half the thumbnail was gone, ripped off in her fall. Her hands throbbed, and her knee was all bloody too.
blocks.explanation_zh: Arya因震惊没看见车辙，摔伤膝、手指并撕掉半片thumbnail。
blocks.literary_note_zh: summoning bells与街头人流传来Eddard将被带到Baelor’s Sept的消息；Arya带伤追赶，听见互相冲突的public rumors。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: “Make way!” someone shouted from the cross street. “Make way for my lords of Redwyne!” It was all Arya could do to get out of the road before they ran her down, four guardsmen on huge horses, pounding past at a gallop. They wore checked cloaks, blue-and-burgundy. Behind them, two young lordlings rode side by side on a pair of chestnut mares alike as peas in a pod. Arya had seen them in the bailey a hundred times; the Redwyne twins, Ser Horas and Ser Hobber, homely youths with orange hair and square, freckled faces. Sansa and Jeyne Poole used to call them Ser Horror and Ser Slobber, and giggle whenever they caught sight of them. They did not look funny now.
blocks.explanation_zh: Redwyne twins与guards疾驰而过；曾被Sansa取笑的两人如今不再好笑。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Ser Horror/Slobber childhood joke失效，说明熟悉court figures已进入真实state violence场景。
blocks.background_zh: **Redwyne twins：** Horas、Hobber曾在court被Sansa/Jeyne取笑，如今随贵族人流赴execution spectacle。

blocks.original_text: Everyone was moving in the same direction, all in a hurry to see what the ringing was all about. The bells seemed louder now, clanging, calling. Arya joined the stream of people. Her thumb hurt so bad where the nail had broken that it was all she could do not to cry. She bit her lip as she limped along, listening to the excited voices around her.
blocks.explanation_zh: 人群奔向bells，Arya忍住手痛加入。
blocks.literary_note_zh: summoning bells与街头人流传来Eddard将被带到Baelor’s Sept的消息；Arya带伤追赶，听见互相冲突的public rumors。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: “—the King’s Hand, Lord Stark. They’re carrying him up to Baelor’s Sept.”
blocks.explanation_zh: 旁人确认Eddard正被带到Baelor’s Sept。
blocks.literary_note_zh: summoning bells与街头人流传来Eddard将被带到Baelor’s Sept的消息；Arya带伤追赶，听见互相冲突的public rumors。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: “I heard he was dead.”
blocks.explanation_zh: 有人曾听说他已死。
blocks.literary_note_zh: summoning bells与街头人流传来Eddard将被带到Baelor’s Sept的消息；Arya带伤追赶，听见互相冲突的public rumors。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: “Soon enough, soon enough. Here, I got me a silver stag says they lop his head off.”
blocks.explanation_zh: 另一人打赌很快会behead。
blocks.literary_note_zh: summoning bells与街头人流传来Eddard将被带到Baelor’s Sept的消息；Arya带伤追赶，听见互相冲突的public rumors。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: “Past time, the traitor.” The man spat.
blocks.explanation_zh: 有人吐口水称traitor早该受罚。
blocks.literary_note_zh: summoning bells与街头人流传来Eddard将被带到Baelor’s Sept的消息；Arya带伤追赶，听见互相冲突的public rumors。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: Arya struggled to find a voice. “He never—” she started, but she was only a child and they talked right over her.
blocks.explanation_zh: Arya想反驳却被成人声音淹没。
blocks.literary_note_zh: child voice被adult crowd覆盖，公共舆论不是平等讨论空间。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: “Fool! They ain’t neither going to lop him. Since when do they knick traitors on the steps of the Great Sept?”
blocks.explanation_zh: 有人认为不会在Great Sept台阶处决traitor。
blocks.literary_note_zh: summoning bells与街头人流传来Eddard将被带到Baelor’s Sept的消息；Arya带伤追赶，听见互相冲突的public rumors。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: “Well, they don’t mean to anoint him no knight. I heard it was Stark killed old King Robert. Slit his throat in the woods, and when they found him, he stood there cool as you please and said it was some old boar did for His Grace.”
blocks.explanation_zh: 另一人编造Eddard在树林割喉杀Robert并栽赃boar。
blocks.literary_note_zh: summoning bells与街头人流传来Eddard将被带到Baelor’s Sept的消息；Arya带伤追赶，听见互相冲突的public rumors。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: “Ah, that’s not true, it was his own brother did him, that Renly, him with his gold antlers.”
blocks.explanation_zh: 又有人把凶手说成Renly。
blocks.literary_note_zh: summoning bells与街头人流传来Eddard将被带到Baelor’s Sept的消息；Arya带伤追赶，听见互相冲突的public rumors。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: “You shut your lying mouth, woman. You don’t know what you’re saying, his lordship’s a fine true man.”
blocks.explanation_zh: 也有人制止谣言，称Eddard是fine true man。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 相反声音证明crowd并非单一仇恨，但truth无法靠音量自然胜出。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: By the time they reached the Street of the Sisters, they were packed in shoulder to shoulder. Arya let the human current carry her along, up to the top of Visenya’s Hill. The white marble plaza was a solid mass of people, all yammering excitedly at each other and straining to get closer to the Great Sept of Baelor. The bells were very loud here.
blocks.explanation_zh: Street of Sisters已挤满人；Arya被人流带上Visenya’s Hill，plaza成为嘈杂人海。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 她爬上Baelor statue，看见虚弱Eddard公开认罪；Joffrey推翻planned mercy，命Ilyn处决。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: Arya squirmed through the press, ducking between the legs of horses and clutching tight to her sword stick. From the middle of the crowd, all she could see were arms and legs and stomachs, and the seven slender towers of the sept looming overhead. She spotted a wood wagon and thought to climb up on the back where she might be able to see, but others had the same idea. The teamster cursed at them and drove them off with a crack of his whip.
blocks.explanation_zh: 她在腿、马匹间钻行，想爬wagon看清却被teamster挥鞭赶走。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 她爬上Baelor statue，看见虚弱Eddard公开认罪；Joffrey推翻planned mercy，命Ilyn处决。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: Arya grew frantic. Forcing her way to the front of the crowd, she was shoved up against the stone of a plinth. She looked up at Baelor the Blessed, the septon king. Sliding her stick sword through her belt, Arya began to climb. Her broken thumbnail left smears of blood on the painted marble, but she made it up, and wedged herself in between the king’s feet.
blocks.explanation_zh: 焦急Arya被推到Baelor statue基座，带伤爬上painted marble并卡在king双脚间。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 她用broken thumbnail blood在Baelor statue上留下痕迹，身体损伤成为取得viewpoint的代价。
blocks.background_zh: **Baelor the Blessed：** 以虔诚、mercy闻名的septon king；Arya爬其statue观看sept台阶。

blocks.original_text: That was when she saw her father.
blocks.explanation_zh: 她终于看见Eddard。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 单句段落延迟并聚焦recognition，视觉目标终于出现。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: Lord Eddard stood on the High Septon’s pulpit outside the doors of the sept, supported between two of the gold cloaks. He was dressed in a rich grey velvet doublet with a white wolf sewn on the front in beads, and a grey wool cloak trimmed with fur, but he was thinner than Arya had ever seen him, his long face drawn with pain. He was not standing so much as being held up; the cast over his broken leg was grey and rotten.
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard穿正式Stark衣饰却消瘦疼痛，必须由两名gold cloaks架住，leg cast已经污坏。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 正式Stark clothing试图恢复lord形象，腐坏cast和被架住的身体却揭示囚禁现实。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: The High Septon himself stood behind him, a squat man, grey with age and ponderously fat, wearing long white robes and an immense crown of spun gold and crystal that wreathed his head with rainbows whenever he moved.
blocks.explanation_zh: 年老肥胖High Septon戴gold/crystal crown站在后方，移动时折射rainbows。
blocks.literary_note_zh: rainbow crown的神圣华丽与即将发生的政治暴力并置。
blocks.background_zh: **High Septon：** Faith of the Seven最高宗教职位，主持公开confession与mercy询问。

blocks.original_text: Clustered around the doors of the sept, in front of the raised marble pulpit, were a knot of knights and high lords. Joffrey was prominent among them, his raiment all crimson, silk and satin patterned with prancing stags and roaring lions, a gold crown on his head. His queen mother stood beside him in a black mourning gown slashed with crimson, a veil of black diamonds in her hair. Arya recognized the Hound, wearing a snowy white cloak over his dark grey armor, with four of the Kingsguard around him. She saw Varys the eunuch gliding among the lords in soft slippers and a patterned damask robe, and she thought the short man with the silvery cape and pointed beard might be the one who had once fought a duel for Mother.
blocks.explanation_zh: Joffrey、Cersei、Hound、Kingsguard、Varys和疑似Littlefinger集中在sept门前。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 她爬上Baelor statue，看见虚弱Eddard公开认罪；Joffrey推翻planned mercy，命Ilyn处决。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: And there in their midst was Sansa, dressed in sky-blue silk, with her long auburn hair washed and curled and silver bracelets on her wrists. Arya scowled, wondering what her sister was doing here, why she looked so happy.
blocks.explanation_zh: Sansa穿sky-blue silk、梳洗整齐并戴bracelets；Arya误以为她看起来happy而生气。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Arya读Sansa as happy是受限误解；整洁礼服不证明姐姐自愿或快乐。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: A long line of gold-cloaked spearmen held back the crowd, commanded by a stout man in elaborate armor, all black lacquer and gold filigree. His cloak had the metallic shimmer of true cloth-of-gold.
blocks.explanation_zh: Janos Slynt以black-and-gold armor统gold-cloaked spearmen阻隔crowd。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 她爬上Baelor statue，看见虚弱Eddard公开认罪；Joffrey推翻planned mercy，命Ilyn处决。
blocks.background_zh: **Janos Slynt：** gold cloaks commander，背叛Eddard后获封；black-and-gold armor者。

blocks.original_text: When the bell ceased to toll, a quiet slowly settled across the great plaza, and her father lifted his head and began to speak, his voice so thin and weak she could scarcely make him out. People behind her began to shout out, “What?” and “Louder!” The man in the black-and-gold armor stepped up behind Father and prodded him sharply. You leave him alone! Arya wanted to shout, but she knew no one would listen. She chewed her lip.
blocks.explanation_zh: bell停后父亲声音太弱，Janos从后戳迫他大声；Arya想保护却知无人会听。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Janos prod把confession的coercion以动作显出，即便具体幕后条件Arya不知道。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: Her father raised his voice and began again. “I am Eddard Stark, Lord of Winterfell and Hand of the King,” he said more loudly, his voice carrying across the plaza, “and I come before you to confess my treason in the sight of gods and men.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard提高声音，自称Hand并在gods/men前confess treason。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Eddard先说身份再认罪，让false public narrative借其名誉取得权威。
blocks.background_zh: **confession bargain：** 读者已知Varys提出confess、认Joffrey换take black并保护Sansa；Arya不知道此背景。

blocks.original_text: “No,” Arya whimpered. Below her, the crowd began to scream and shout. Taunts and obscenities filled the air. Sansa had hidden her face in her hands.
blocks.explanation_zh: Arya低声否认，crowd辱骂；Sansa用手遮脸。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 她爬上Baelor statue，看见虚弱Eddard公开认罪；Joffrey推翻planned mercy，命Ilyn处决。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: Her father raised his voice still higher, straining to be heard. “I betrayed the faith of my king and the trust of my friend, Robert,” he shouted. “I swore to defend and protect his children, yet before his blood was cold, I plotted to depose and murder his son and seize the throne for myself. Let the High Septon and Baelor the Beloved and the Seven bear witness to the truth of what I say: Joffrey Baratheon is the one true heir to the Iron Throne, and by the grace of all the gods, Lord of the Seven Kingdoms and Protector of the Realm.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard继续宣称背叛Robert、图谋Joffrey并承认其true heir；这是公开完整confession。
blocks.literary_note_zh: confession内容与Arya所知father character冲突；她无法得知他为何如此说。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: A stone came sailing out of the crowd. Arya cried out as she saw her father hit. The gold cloaks kept him from falling. Blood ran down his face from a deep gash across his forehead. More stones followed. One struck the guard to Father’s left. Another went clanging off the breastplate of the knight in the black-and-gold armor. Two of the Kingsguard stepped in front of Joffrey and the queen, protecting them with their shields.
blocks.explanation_zh: stone击伤Eddard额头，更多石块飞来，Kingsguard举盾护Joffrey和Cersei。
blocks.literary_note_zh: stones显示群众不仅接受narrative，还被许可把政治仇恨转为身体攻击。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: Her hand slid beneath her cloak and found Needle in its sheath. She tightened her fingers around the grip, squeezing as hard as she had ever squeezed anything. Please, gods, keep him safe, she prayed. Don’t let them hurt my father.
blocks.explanation_zh: Arya握住cloak下Needle，祈求gods保护父亲。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 她爬上Baelor statue，看见虚弱Eddard公开认罪；Joffrey推翻planned mercy，命Ilyn处决。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: The High Septon knelt before Joffrey and his mother. “As we sin, so do we suffer,” he intoned, in a deep swelling voice much louder than Father’s. “This man has confessed his crimes in the sight of gods and men, here in this holy place.” Rainbows danced around his head as he lifted his hands in entreaty. “The gods are just, yet Blessed Baelor taught us that they are also merciful. What shall be done with this traitor, Your Grace?”
blocks.explanation_zh: High Septon以sin/suffering和Baelor mercy框架询问Joffrey如何处置。
blocks.literary_note_zh: High Septon把决定包装在mercy ritual中，但实际裁量属于Joffrey。
blocks.background_zh: **take the black：** 放弃titles与politics终身加入Night’s Watch，是原定execution替代方案。

blocks.original_text: A thousand voices were screaming, but Arya never heard them. Prince Joffrey . . . no, King Joffrey . . . stepped out from behind the shields of his Kingsguard. “My mother bids me let Lord Eddard take the black, and Lady Sansa has begged mercy for her father.” He looked straight at Sansa then, and smiled, and for a moment Arya thought that the gods had heard her prayer, until Joffrey turned back to the crowd and said, “But they have the soft hearts of women. So long as I am your king, treason shall never go unpunished. Ser Ilyn, bring me his head!”
blocks.explanation_zh: Joffrey先提Cersei要Eddard take black、Sansa求情，使Arya短暂以为祈祷奏效；随后斥women soft-hearted并命Ilyn斩首。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Joffrey先重述planned mercy再推翻，命令也令Cersei/Varys惊讶，说明execution不是现场所有权力者共识。
blocks.background_zh: **decision shift：** Cersei支持take black、Sansa求mercy；Joffrey现场改判death，其他人随即试图阻止。

blocks.original_text: The crowd roared, and Arya felt the statue of Baelor rock as they surged against it. The High Septon clutched at the king’s cape, and Varys came rushing over waving his arms, and even the queen was saying something to him, but Joffrey shook his head. Lords and knights moved aside as he stepped through, tall and fleshless, a skeleton in iron mail, the King’s Justice. Dimly, as if from far off, Arya heard her sister scream. Sansa had fallen to her knees, sobbing hysterically. Ser Ilyn Payne climbed the steps of the pulpit.
blocks.explanation_zh: crowd涌动，High Septon、Varys、Cersei都试图阻止，Sansa崩溃尖叫；Ilyn走上pulpit。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 多方阻止却没人能立即逆转king command，制度服从和crowd momentum让冲动成为现实。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: Arya wriggled between Baelor’s feet and threw herself into the crowd, drawing Needle. She landed on a man in a butcher’s apron, knocking him to the ground. Immediately someone slammed into her back and she almost went down herself. Bodies closed in around her, stumbling and pushing, trampling on the poor butcher. Arya slashed at them with Needle.
blocks.explanation_zh: Arya拔Needle跳进人群，砸倒butcher并朝围堵身体挥剑。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Arya以Needle冲入crowd是情感必然但战术无效，child无法穿越密集人群与guards。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: High atop the pulpit, Ser Ilyn Payne gestured and the knight in black-and-gold gave a command. The gold cloaks flung Lord Eddard to the marble, with his head and chest out over the edge.
blocks.explanation_zh: Ilyn示意后gold cloaks把Eddard按在marble边缘。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Arya徒劳持Needle冲向父亲；Yoren阻止她观看、保住身份并带离plaza，最后以knife动作留下悬念。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: “Here, you!” an angry voice shouted at Arya, but she bowled past, shoving people aside, squirming between them, slamming into anyone in her way. A hand fumbled at her leg and she hacked at it, kicked at shins. A woman stumbled and Arya ran up her back, cutting to both sides, but it was no good, no good, there were too many people, no sooner did she make a hole than it closed again. Someone buffeted her aside. She could still hear Sansa screaming.
blocks.explanation_zh: Arya推挤、砍手、踢腿甚至踏人前进，但人墙不断合拢，仍听见Sansa尖叫。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Arya徒劳持Needle冲向父亲；Yoren阻止她观看、保住身份并带离plaza，最后以knife动作留下悬念。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: Ser Ilyn drew a two-handed greatsword from the scabbard on his back. As he lifted the blade above his head, sunlight seemed to ripple and dance down the dark metal, glinting off an edge sharper than any razor. Ice, she thought, he has Ice! Her tears streamed down her face, blinding her.
blocks.explanation_zh: Ilyn拔出的dark greatsword是Ice；Arya认出家族剑，泪水遮住视线。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Ice从Stark justice象征变为Ilyn execution weapon，家族权力被敌方占用。
blocks.background_zh: **Ice：** House Stark Valyrian-steel greatsword，原由Eddard执行justice，如今落入Ilyn手中。

blocks.original_text: And then a hand shot out of the press and closed round her arm like a wolf trap, so hard that Needle went flying from her hand. Arya was wrenched off her feet. She would have fallen if he hadn’t held her up, as easy as if she were a doll. A face pressed close to hers, long black hair and tangled beard and rotten teeth. “Don’t look!” a thick voice snarled at her.
blocks.explanation_zh: 一只强手抓住Arya并打飞Needle，长发乱须老人命她不要看。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Yoren的强制抓握表面像攻击，实际目标是阻止Arya目睹和暴露身份。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: “I . . . I . . . I . . . ” Arya sobbed.
blocks.explanation_zh: Arya只能结巴哭泣。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Arya徒劳持Needle冲向父亲；Yoren阻止她观看、保住身份并带离plaza，最后以knife动作留下悬念。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: The old man shook her so hard her teeth rattled. “Shut your mouth and close your eyes, boy.” Dimly, as if from far away, she heard a . . . a noise . . . a soft sighing sound, as if a million people had let out their breath at once. The old man’s fingers dug into her arm, stiff as iron. “Look at me. Yes, that’s the way of it, at me.” Sour wine perfumed his breath. “Remember, boy?”
blocks.explanation_zh: 老人强迫她闭眼看自己；在人群共同sigh声中阻断她观看，并问是否remember。
blocks.literary_note_zh: million people sigh以sound替代visual execution，延续本书用受限感官表现创伤。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: It was the smell that did it. Arya saw the matted greasy hair, the patched, dusty black cloak that covered his twisted shoulders, the hard black eyes squinting at her. And she remembered the black brother who had come to visit her father.
blocks.explanation_zh: sour wine气味与patched black cloak让Arya认出曾拜访Eddard的black brother。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Arya徒劳持Needle冲向父亲；Yoren阻止她观看、保住身份并带离plaza，最后以knife动作留下悬念。
blocks.background_zh: **Yoren：** Night’s Watch recruiter，曾在Red Keep拜访Eddard；他认出并以boy称Arya保护身份。

blocks.original_text: “Know me now, do you? There’s a bright boy.” He spat. “They’re done here. You’ll be coming with me, and you’ll be keeping your mouth shut.” When she started to reply, he shook her again, even harder. “Shut, I said.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Yoren确认她认出自己，命她闭嘴并跟走。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Arya徒劳持Needle冲向父亲；Yoren阻止她观看、保住身份并带离plaza，最后以knife动作留下悬念。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: The plaza was beginning to empty. The press dissolved around them as people drifted back to their lives. But Arya’s life was gone. Numb, she trailed along beside . . . Yoren, yes, his name is Yoren. She did not recall him finding Needle, until he handed the sword back to her. “Hope you can use that, boy.”
blocks.explanation_zh: plaza迅速恢复日常，但Arya觉得自己的life已消失；麻木跟随Yoren，后者捡回Needle。
blocks.literary_note_zh: plaza disperses／life gone形成残酷反差：public spectacle结束，个人世界不可恢复。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: “I’m not—” she started.
blocks.explanation_zh: Arya刚要否认自己是boy。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Arya徒劳持Needle冲向父亲；Yoren阻止她观看、保住身份并带离plaza，最后以knife动作留下悬念。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: He shoved her into a doorway, thrust dirty fingers through her hair, and gave it a twist, yanking her head back. “—not a smart boy, that what you mean to say?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Yoren把她推入doorway、揪住头发，讽刺她不是smart boy。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Yoren继续维持boy cover，粗暴方式也防止Arya当众纠正并暴露。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: He had a knife in his other hand.
blocks.explanation_zh: 他另一手拿着knife。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Arya徒劳持Needle冲向父亲；Yoren阻止她观看、保住身份并带离plaza，最后以knife动作留下悬念。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。

blocks.original_text: As the blade flashed toward her face, Arya threw herself backward, kicking wildly, wrenching her head from side to side, but he had her by the hair, so strong, she could feel her scalp tearing, and on her lips the salt taste of tears.
blocks.explanation_zh: blade向脸靠近时Arya激烈反抗，却被牢牢抓住头发，章节停在危险表象上。
blocks.literary_note_zh: knife cliffhanger需按当前信息保留不确定；不能提前说明其具体用途。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的设定；重点在Arya如何把Syrio训练转化为街头survival、public rumor与受限child perspective。
